## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets (`.env`, API keys, real DB dumps).
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior or config changed (`README.md` / `docs/`).
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend) if TS changed.
- [ ] Backend starts without import errors if Python changed.
